name: Bulkie Rolls
recipeInstructions:
1. In the bread machine, combine liquid ingredients (1 1/2 cups water and 2 tablespoons water), salt, and sugar.
2. Add flour, semolina, and pumpernickel flour to the bread machine.
3. Make a well in the flour mixture and add the dry yeast.
4. Program the machine for the dough cycle and allow it to complete the cycle, forming 8-12 rolls of desired size.
5. Slash the rolls diagonally.
6. Let the rolls rise for 2 hours.
7. Preheat the oven to 425 degrees F (220 degrees C).
8. Bake the rolls for 20 minutes until browned.
9. Mist the oven with water during the first 10 minutes of baking time.
10. Turn off the oven and allow the rolls to cool for 10 minutes in the oven.
